messages.content: You must return JSON only. No markdown, no code fences, no commentary. Return a single JSON object with keys: mode, topic, opinion, reasoning_summary.

Produce your very own perspective on the given topic. Align tone and examples with the persona's background and traits. Focus on discussing your topic. Avoid bullet points. Produce continuous prose. Write at least 250 words, up to 500 words.

OUTPUT FORMAT (STRICT):
Return ONLY a single-line JSON object, with no extra text, no markdown, no comments.
Here is the required structure example (values are placeholders):

response_raw:
{
  "mode": "human",
  "topic": "How to manage and dealing with discussions about healthcare and COVID vaccines.",
  "opinion": "As an 87-year-old delivery driver in Los Angeles, I've seen a lot in my time, and when it comes to talking about healthcare and COVID vaccines, I believe it's all about listening and sharing from the heart. I'm self-employed, driving around this big city every day, meeting all kinds of people, and that's taught me to be open and friendly—my high extraversion and agreeableness scores mean I love connecting with others, even on tough topics. I don't have formal education, but I've learned from life, like when I immigrated here and had to figure things out on my own. Being agnostic, I don't rely on religious beliefs for answers; instead, I look at what works, like how vaccines helped protect me and my community during the pandemic. In discussions, I focus on personal stories, like how my yoga and gardening keep me healthy, or how volunteering showed me the importance of community care. I avoid getting into heated arguments—my low neuroticism keeps me calm—and instead, I ask questions and share my experiences, like how getting vaccinated let me keep delivering essentials safely. I spend little time on social media, so I rely on real conversations, which feels more honest. As a widowed mother of two, I think about family and safety, and I encourage others to do the same, respecting different views without pushing. It's about finding common ground, like we all want health and happiness, and moving forward together with kindness and understanding.",
  "reasoning_summary": "Derived opinion from persona traits: age 87 suggests life experience; occupation as delivery driver implies frequent social interactions; high openness (88) indicates willingness to discuss diverse views; high extraversion (99) and agreeableness (76) favor friendly, engaging communication; low neuroticism (26) promotes calmness in debates; no formal education leads to reliance on practical knowledge; agnostic beliefs avoid religious bias; limited social media use emphasizes in-person talks; hobbies like volunteering inform community-focused perspectives; migration status adds resilience; marital status and children introduce family safety concerns. Tone is conversational and empathetic, aligning with high agreeableness and extraversion, avoiding technical jargon due to education level, and focusing on personal anecdotes from delivery work and hobbies.",
  "tone": "Conversational, empathetic, and practical, with a friendly and calm demeanor reflecting high agreeableness and extraversion, and a focus on real-world experiences over formal arguments.",
  "citations": ["none"],

}

response_parsed.topic: How to manage and dealing with discussions about healthcare and COVID vaccines.
response_parsed.opinion: As an 87-year-old delivery driver in Los Angeles, I've seen a lot in my time, and when it comes to talking about healthcare and COVID vaccines, I believe it's all about listening and sharing from the heart. I'm self-employed, driving around this big city every day, meeting all kinds of people, and that's taught me to be open and friendly—my high extraversion and agreeableness scores mean I love connecting with others, even on tough topics. I don't have formal education, but I've learned from life, like when I immigrated here and had to figure things out on my own. Being agnostic, I don't rely on religious beliefs for answers; instead, I look at what works, like how vaccines helped protect me and my community during the pandemic. In discussions, I focus on personal stories, like how my yoga and gardening keep me healthy, or how volunteering showed me the importance of community care. I avoid getting into heated arguments—my low neuroticism keeps me calm—and instead, I ask questions and share my experiences, like how getting vaccinated let me keep delivering essentials safely. I spend little time on social media, so I rely on real conversations, which feels more honest. As a widowed mother of two, I think about family and safety, and I encourage others to do the same, respecting different views without pushing. It's about finding common ground, like we all want health and happiness, and moving forward together with kindness and understanding.
response_parsed.reasoning_summary: Derived opinion from persona traits: age 87 suggests life experience; occupation as delivery driver implies frequent social interactions; high openness (88) indicates willingness to discuss diverse views; high extraversion (99) and agreeableness (76) favor friendly, engaging communication; low neuroticism (26) promotes calmness in debates; no formal education leads to reliance on practical knowledge; agnostic beliefs avoid religious bias; limited social media use emphasizes in-person talks; hobbies like volunteering inform community-focused perspectives; migration status adds resilience; marital status and children introduce family safety concerns. Tone is conversational and empathetic, aligning with high agreeableness and extraversion, avoiding technical jargon due to education level, and focusing on personal anecdotes from delivery work and hobbies.
response_parsed.tone: Conversational, empathetic, and practical, with a friendly and calm demeanor reflecting high agreeableness and extraversion, and a focus on real-world experiences over formal arguments.
